background: Calculate the reliability and Mean Time To Failure (MTTF) of $k$-out-of-$(2k-1)$ systems for different values of $k$ and time $t$. The failure rates are given as $\lambda_1=0.0025 / h$, $\lambda_2=0.005 / h$, $\lambda_3=0.01 / h$, and the repair rates are $\mu_1=\mu_2=\mu_3=0$. The calculation involves using Eqs. (6.42) and (6.43).

task.query: Calculate the reliability and MTTF of $k$-out-of-$(2k-1)$ systems when $k=1$ for various time $t$ using Eqs. (6.42) and (6.43).
task.answer: Using Eqs. (42) and (43)), one can obtain the results.
